suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit carve-out in the rust-worker skill's TDD step for documentation-only features (e.g., README creation), where no Rust code is changed and command verification plus the full validator suite is the appropriate validation strategy instead of writing unit tests first.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature finalize-readme worker deviated from 'Write Tests First (TDD)' step because the feature only created a README.md with no Rust behavior to test. The worker's approach of verifying documented behaviors via command spot checks and the full validator suite was correct and sufficient.
